title: bank of england / foreign exchange reserves / usd bond | Issuance Announcement | Foreign Currency Reserves 2026 – Market Notice 9 February 20...
summary: The Bank of England has announced its first 2026 foreign exchange reserve financing operation: a benchmark 3-year US dollar bond. The operation will be managed by four joint lead managers (RBC Capital Markets, BMO Capital Markets, HSBC Bank plc, and Morgan Stanley). This issuance follows the Bank's September 2025 announcement to shift to two benchmark issuances annually under a structured programme with regular timing and high transparency.
